episode_name: Encirclement, siege, and final assault inside Budapest
theater_description: The encircled city battle in Budapest from completed encirclement through capitulation.
geometry_method_note: The episode follows the city-battle window from 26 December 1944 to 13 February 1945 and excludes wider operations in Hungary.
military_area_note: Defender strength is city-bound. The attacker denominator uses the cited Soviet city-assault force but does not impute an unquantified Romanian corps strength.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure is limited to the inhabitants inside Budapest itself, not to wider Hungarian population stocks.
split_reason: One episode is preferred because the available city-bounded death and denominator evidence converges on the full siege-and-assault window.
quality_note: The best open evidence supports a publishable direct-death DR, but the estimate still relies on secondary summaries and a conservative denominator treatment.
